metadata.title: Sneaking Through B Site for a Clean 2-Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Took a quiet route to surprise the enemy on B site and secured two quick kills. Timing and patience paid off big here. What’s your favorite sneaky play?

Share your best flank moments below!

Let me know your favorite sneaky agent in the comments!

#valorant #shorts #gaming #fps #valorantclips
metadata.cta: Let me know your favorite sneaky agent in the comments!
